mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS productId, pov.id AS optionValueId, p.name AS productName, pov.value AS optionValue, mc.name AS categoryName,
(p.image_url ->> 0) AS imageUrl,
pov.additional_price AS price,
pov.stock AS stock,
COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) AS salesCount,
COALESCE( SUM(oi.quantity * COALESCE(pov.additional_price, 0)), 0 ) AS totalSalesAmount,
p.sales_status AS salesStatus
FROM product_option_values pov
JOIN product_options po ON po.id = pov.option_id AND po.visible = true
JOIN products p ON p.id = po.product_id AND p.visible = true
LEFT JOIN menu_categories mc ON mc.id = p.category_id
LEFT JOIN order_item_options oio ON oio.option_value_id = pov.id
LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON oi.id = oio.order_item_id
WHERE p.partner_id = #{partnerId}
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.sales_status, p.image_url, pov.id, pov.value, pov.additional_price, pov.stock, mc.name
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
